name: Model
description: Model schema from Amazon SageMaker API

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model.

ModelDataUrl.description: The S3 path where the model artifacts are stored.

Environment.description: Environment variables to set in the container.

ExecutionRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role.

CreationTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the model was created.
